name: Bean Burgers by Anita Cecena.
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cracker meal or bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Saute onions and garlic in stock/wine until fragrant.
3. Combine beans, cracker meal, egg whites, parsley, vinegar, and seasonings. Mash well with a fork until blended but not completely smooth.
4. Form the mixture into hamburger-sized patties (some can be frozen, others refrigerated).
5. Cook patties in a toaster oven for about 20 minutes, or until the egg/bread crumbs are brown and the patty is slightly dry.
6. Experiment with variations: white beans, black beans, sauteed mushrooms, hot sauce, catsup, etc., ensuring good texture and cohesiveness in the final product. Enjoy!
